meta.title: MzeDev — Web Development by an Independent Developer
meta.description: Modern, fast and scalable websites and web apps. Frontend, backend and full-stack development for startups and businesses.
meta.keywords: web development, web design, frontend, backend, react, next.js, full-stack developer

hero.title2: — and I'll help you reach results
hero.subtitle: Full-stack web development focused on clean code, beautiful design and measurable results. From idea to launch — fast, reliable and scalable.

services.title: What I can do for you
services.subtitle: End-to-end web development — everything you need to launch and scale your product online.

items.title: Web Applications
items.desc: Complex, interactive web apps with smooth UX, real-time features and rock-solid architecture.

items.title: Frontend & UI
items.desc: Pixel-perfect, responsive interfaces built with React and Next.js that feel fast and look stunning.

items.title: Backend & APIs
items.desc: Secure, scalable backends, REST and GraphQL APIs, databases and cloud infrastructure.

items.title: E-commerce
items.desc: Online stores and payment integrations that convert visitors into customers and grow revenue.

items.title: Performance & SEO
items.desc: Lightning-fast load times, Core Web Vitals optimization and search-engine-ready code.

items.title: Support & Maintenance
items.desc: Ongoing updates, monitoring and improvements to keep your product secure and up to date.

skills.title: Tools I work with
skills.subtitle: A modern, battle-tested toolkit for building products that last.

portfolio.title: Cases I've worked on
portfolio.subtitle: Over 6 years building and scaling complex B2B/B2C web applications — from retail super-apps to document workflow and EdTech platforms.

items.title: Retail Super-App Platform
items.desc: Architected and delivered a high-load quick-survey system under tight deadlines and built a micro-frontends architecture inside a retail super-app, enabling independent deployment and scaling of features. Added a real-time WebSocket chat-bot module and strengthened the Node.js BFF layer.

items.title: Document Management Platform
items.desc: Modernized the architecture of a large-scale document management platform and optimized Webpack builds. Reduced backend load by improving the BFF layer with request caching, and accelerated delivery via Docker-cached CI/CD, shared component libraries and frontend code generation.

items.title: EdTech Learning Platform
items.desc: Built a custom video player with timestamps and a dynamic course builder for an online education product. Set up a unified analytics abstraction (Google/Yandex) and a contract-first workflow with backend teams using Swagger.

items.title: CRM & GovTech Solutions
items.desc: Delivered high-impact features across CRM and GovTech products. Improved Developer Experience by configuring GitHub Actions CI/CD and enforcing code standards with ESLint to keep large teams fast and consistent.

items.title: CS:GO Case Opening Platform
items.desc: A gaming platform for opening Counter-Strike: GO cases — with animated roulette-style drops, real-time inventory, item upgrade mechanics and secure payments.

process.title: A simple, transparent process
process.subtitle: Clear communication and steady progress from the first call to launch and beyond.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.desc: We discuss your goals, audience and requirements to define a clear scope and roadmap.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: I craft wireframes and a polished UI that matches your brand and delights your users.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Clean, tested and well-documented code built in short iterations with regular demos.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.desc: We ship to production, monitor performance and keep improving after release.

contact.title: Let's build something great
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? I usually reply within a few hours.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: An independent developer based in Tbilisi, Georgia — registered as an individual entrepreneur and working with clients worldwide.
about.name: Andrei
about.bio: Hi! I'm a full-stack developer with 6+ years of experience building and scaling complex B2B/B2C web applications — e-commerce, document workflow, EdTech and gaming platforms. On the frontend I work with React and TypeScript; on the backend with Node.js and Golang — so you get fast, reliable products and a single point of contact.
about.addressValue: Georgia, Tbilisi, Saburtalo district, Bakhtrioni street, N22
